steps.title: Identify what the research resolves
steps.content: The passage states that Kershaw et al.'s research “reconciles two competing theories,” indicating that before this evidence, the field was defined by competing, unproven explanations rather than settled conclusions.

steps.title: Choose the word for an unsettled field
steps.content:
Speculative means “based on conjecture rather than proven knowledge,” which perfectly captures a field defined by competing, unresolved theories.

The other three either describe unrelated qualities or contradict the passage's narrative that firm details are now being supplied.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
